title: Cod of Undying (Totem of Undying)
description: Changes Totem of Undying to a Cod with same color palette.
body:
**🐟 Instead of the usual totem, you’ve got your fish keeping you alive.**

No matter what’s coming your way, creepers, lava, or that one skeleton with perfect aim, the fish has your back.

The moment things go wrong, it leaps into action, saving you from certain doom and blessing your ears.

**🎵 Rapapa rapapa rapapa rapapa**
